__meta._note: SYNTHETIC fixture — NOT real corridor data. Column names match the live corridor_profiles table (confirmed via schema dump 2026-05-14) so the Tier-1 smoke test validates the real schema. cre-source.mts normalizeCorridor() is the single point of schema knowledge.
__meta._shape: One row per SWFL CRE corridor. The live fetch filters deleted_at IS NULL AND verification_status = 'verified' — fixture rows all reflect that state. There is NO county column; county is derived from city in normalize(). active_flags is the de-facto 'hidden truths' layer.

rows.character: The 'Suburban 5th Avenue' — true commercial gravity center of north Collier, anchored by daytime medical-tech employment rather than seasonal tourism.
rows.tenant_mix: Arthrex HQ campus, Seed to Table grocery, national QSR pads, medical office

active_flags.flag: Arthrex Effect — non-seasonal daytime economy, year-round captive workforce

rows.character: Legacy commercial spine in structural decline. Auto-row dealerships thinning, retail vacancy climbing north of Colonial.
rows.tenant_mix: Auto dealerships (declining), Edison Mall (struggling), discount retail

rows.corridor_name: Gulf Coast Town Center / Alico Rd
rows.character: Big-box power center whose health tracks a handful of anchor leases. Anchor turnover is the dominant risk variable.
rows.tenant_mix: Costco, Bass Pro, Belk, mid-box junior anchors

active_flags.flag: Alico Rd widening to six lanes

rows.character: Neighborhood-serving retail spine for a fast-growing residential base. Demand is rooftop-driven, not destination-driven.
Barrier-island tourism corridor mid-rebuild after Hurricane Ian. Extreme seasonality — winter-quarter revenue carries the year.
rows.tenant_mix: Beachfront F&B, resort retail, tourist services

active_flags.flag: Margaritaville Resort reopening anchoring the rebuild

rows.tenant_mix: Strip retail, national QSR, big-box junior anchors

rows.character: Medical-office and health-services corridor with a stable, age-driven demand base less exposed to tourist seasonality.
rows.tenant_mix: Physician groups, outpatient surgical, pharmacy, supporting retail

rows.character: Logistics and light-industrial flex corridor riding regional distribution growth. Effectively zero seasonality.
